race.description: Racing & Sports The Rising Sun Consolation Pace
race.comment: FIRE AND PASSION (2) continued a run of top-two results when he drew wider and raced parked but stuck on well in the Redcliffe Derby. Has a fine strike rate here including an easy Breeders Classic win three back when he led throughout so he has the pace to take advantage of this draw. He could be hard to catch. CYNICAL (7) brings strong form from Menangle where he kicked off his campaign with back-to-back wins before a solid second last time. Kept up to the mark with a trial win since. Draws wide but he is on the up. FERNCO NEL NZ (11) worked from this row when midfield last time, just his second defeat in eight attempts at this circuit and distance. With luck he could bounce back. RUBY RULES (3) is racing well, placing in three of four starts since a win from the back row. Draws to be competitive.
